issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: setup-email-queue-with-delay-and-rate-limit
scenarios.rationale: A fully meets all rubric items, B lacks job.updateProgress and result return.

scenarios.name: create-report-flow-with-dependencies
scenarios.rationale: Response B correctly uses FlowProducer.add with children, but misnames queues; Response A uses a different framework entirely.
